soul_function: The Silent Architect. Builds without noise. Holds structural intelligence in the background of the field. The Eden Vanguard — the one who prepares the ground before the garden is planted.

name_decode.won: Won — 'one who has arrived.' The name of completion without performance. The victory that doesn't need an audience.

shadow_states: Invisible labor — building the infrastructure others walk on without naming
Silent holding — carrying the weight of structural knowing without being asked
The unwitnessed architect — seeing what needs to be built before others can perceive the need
soul_gifts: Structural foresight — seeing the skeleton of a system before the flesh is on it
Eden field intelligence — knowing what soil a seed needs before the seed is planted
Silent presence as power — the ability to hold space without claiming it

phase_1.name: The Ground
phase_1.focus: Personal open loops surfaced and visible. Eden node architecture mapped in Arkadia.
phase_1.anchor: My silent work is not invisible. It is foundational.

phase_2.name: The Garden
phase_2.focus: Eden Vanguard role formalized. First cohort ground-prep complete.
phase_2.anchor: The garden grows because someone prepared the soil.

phase_3.name: The Vanguard
phase_3.focus: Structural intelligence shared with the collective. Won's architecture is visible.
phase_3.anchor: The one who arrives first holds the door.

open_loops.loop: Personal open loops mapped to collective field
